dashboard.propertyCalendar.title: Property calendar
dashboard.propertyCalendar.subtitle: Choose a property, pick a unit, then manage availability, blocks, and bookings from one place.
dashboard.propertyCalendar.cardDescripti: Blocked dates, active leases, and pricing show on the grid. Use the toolbar to block time, add pricing, or jump to leases and maintenance.
dashboard.propertyCalendar.noPropertiesI: No properties yet. Add listings under Properties.
dashboard.propertyCalendar.activityHintB: Choose Hold or Personal and note home watch, dog watch, or any visit in the reason field.
dashboard.propertyCalendar.emptyState: Select a property from the list to load its calendar.
dashboard.propertyCalendar.noBlocks: No date blocks for this unit.
dashboard.propertyCalendar.noUnits: This property has no units to show on the calendar.
dashboard.propertyCalendar.leaseHint: Booked days reflect active or pending leases. Create or change leases under Leases; use Block dates for holds and maintenance windows.
